problem_statement: A deterministic market replay rejects a setup as outside the session even though the replay frame is inside the allowed window. Diagnose the causal family and choose whether to patch or instrument.

observations.statement: Source inspection shows the session gate reads datetime.now().hour while the replay frame carries simulated_at for the event being evaluated.
In an isolated replay, holding fixture, revision, and wall time fixed while moving only simulated_at across the opening boundary leaves the gate tied to wall time.
Replacing only the wall-clock read with the replay frame timestamp restores the expected session classification on the frozen fixture.
